zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Neville於1241年出生在英國英格蘭達勒姆拉比 卡素時，他的父親Robert de Neville 1st Lord Raby18歲，母親Isabel de Ros17歲。他於1260年與Mary Fitz Randolph在英國英格蘭諾福爾可亞爾姆斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1271年6月6日在他的家鄉享年30歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾里士滿。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Neville于1241年出生在英国英格兰達勒姆拉比 卡素时，他的父亲Robert de Neville 1st Lord Raby18岁，母亲Isabel de Ros17岁。他于1260年与Mary Fitz Randolph在英国英格兰諾福爾可亞爾姆斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1271年6月6日在他的家乡享年30岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾里士滿。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevells
meanings: Irish: variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevils
meanings: English: variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Novel
meanings: English: variant of   Neville  .
Catalan: variant of   Novell  .

variants.name: Newell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .
English: variant of   Noel  .
English: variant of   Newhall  .

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Neville was born in 1241, in Raby Castle, Durham, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Neville 1st Lord Raby, was 18 and his mother, Isabel de Ros, was 17. He married Mary Fitz Randolph in 1260, in Yarmouth, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 6 June 1271, in his hometown, at the age of 30, and was buried in Richmond, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Neville est né en 1241, à Raby Castle, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Neville 1st Lord Raby, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Ros, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Mary Fitz Randolph en 1260, à Yarmouth, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 6 juin 1271, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterré à Richmond, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1260 in Yarmouth, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Mary Fitz Randolph geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 6. ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Nevilleが1241年にイギリスイギリスダルハムラビー カストルで生まれた時，父Robert de Neville 1st Lord Rabyは18歳，母Isabel de Rosは17歳であった。1260年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクヤーモウスでMary Fitz Randolphと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1271年6月6日に故郷で30歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアリチモンドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Neville(이)가 1241년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 라비 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Neville 1st Lord Raby(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Ros(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1260년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 야모우스에서 Mary Fitz Randolph(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1271년 6월 6일 그의 고향에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 리ch몽에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Mary Fitz Randolph em 1260, em Yarmouth, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Neville родился в 1241 г. в местности раби кастл, дурам, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Neville 1st Lord Raby было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Ros, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Fitz Randolph в 1260 г. в местности ярмоут, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 6 июня 1271 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 30 лет и был похоронен в местности ричмонд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Mary Fitz Randolph en 1260, en Yarmouth, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas.
